name: Chef Automate Deployment
description: Bash script for deploying Chef Automate and Chef Infra Server with user creation, organization setup, and system configuration.

name: Chef Server Deployment
description: Bash script for deploying standalone Chef Infra Server with user creation, organization setup, and system configuration.

name: HTTPS Website Deployment
description: Ansible playbook for deploying a secure website with SSL, including Apache configuration, SSL certificate generation, and virtual host setup.

name: SSL Poodle Vulnerability Fix
description: Ansible playbook to fix SSL Poodle vulnerability in Apache by configuring SSL protocols and restarting services.
